paper_title: Exploring the Limits of Transfer Learning with a Unified Text-to-Text Transformer
evaluation_method: WMT Romanian-English translation evaluated using T5-style text-to-text prompts as introduced by Raffel et al. (2020). The translation task is reformulated as a text generation problem with a task-specific prefix (e.g., 'translate Romanian to English:'). The model generates English translations from Romanian source text. Evaluation uses BLEU score to measure translation quality. This follows the T5 unified text-to-text framework where all tasks including translation use the same encoder-decoder architecture.
